Bus Timings

Dubai Bus 20A: Route and Stops Guide

December 12, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus 20A offers a comprehensive route across various neighborhoods and key locations in Dubai. The service is designed to cater to daily commuters and those visiting popular destinations within the city.

Route Name 20A
Route Description Al Nahda 1, Terminus - Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 2
Total Distance Approximately 10-20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 02:13 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 20A

Bus Timings

  • From Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 2 (alighting only): 07:18, 07:43, 08:08, 08:48, 09:08, 09:48, 10:13, 10:48, 11:18, 11:48, 12:23, 12:48, 13:21, 13:50, 14:19, 14:49, 15:18, 15:55, 16:25, 17:00, 17:26, 17:53, 18:22, 18:51, 19:48, 20:18, 20:53, 21:27, 21:53, 22:18, 22:48, 23:30, 00:00, 00:28, 01:03, 02:13

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 20A is set at AED 5. This ticket price offers an economical way to travel across the entire route, making it a budget-friendly choice for both daily commuters and occasional travelers. Additionally, the fare remains consistent regardless of the distance traveled on the route.

Bus Booking

For Bus 20A, there is no need for prior booking as it operates on a standard boarding system.

Bus Route

The Bus 20A route covers a diverse range of stops, providing accessibility to numerous areas within Dubai. The journey begins at Al Nahda 1, Terminus and travels through the following notable locations:

  1. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

  2. Burj Al Noor

  3. Burj Al Noor

  4. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

  5. ENOC

  6. NMC Hospital

  7. Shabab Al Ahli Club

  8. Stadium Metro

  9. DM Accommodation

  10. Al Twar 1, Street 16C

  11. Street 16A

  12. Airport Terminal 2, Departure

  13. Airport Terminal 2, Arrival

  14. Maria Qibtiya School

  15. Emirates Engineering

  16. Rashidiya Bus Station · 3

  17. Manama Road 4

  18. International City, Greece

  19. Civil Defence

  20. Post Office

  21. Dragon Mart

  22. International City, China 2

  23. International City, China 3

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. International City, Morocco

  2. Sewage Treatment Plant

  3. Warsan Second, 3

  4. Dubai Nursery

  5. Dubai Birds and Pets Market

  6. Flydubai HQ

  7. Dubai Birds and Pets Market

  8. Dubai Nursery

  9. Dubai Municipaclity Nursery

  10. Emirates Transport Driving Institute

  11. Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 1

  12. Civil Defence Training Centre

  13. Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 2

Bus 20A Station Overview

Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Al Nahda 1, Terminus is a key bus station situated in the Al Nahda 1 area, serving as a central transit point for residents and commuters.

It offers amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth travel experience. Its strategic location in a busy commercial and residential area provides easy access to local shops, services, and nearby neighborhoods. By facilitating seamless connections between various routes, the terminus plays a crucial role in efficient transportation within and beyond the Al Nahda area, making it a vital hub for commuters across Dubai.

Airport Terminal 2, Departure Bus Stop Intersection

Situated conveniently at the departure area of Dubai International Airport, this station is designed for seamless connectivity, providing quick and direct access to the terminal.

With modern amenities like digital screens displaying real-time flight and bus schedule information, it ensures a hassle-free travel experience for passengers. Whether heading to or from the airport, this well-maintained stop offers efficient transit options across the city.

Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 2

This station provides essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and up-to-date schedule information, ensuring a comfortable and efficient commuting experience for RTA employees.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable attractions and destinations along the Bus 20A route:

  1. It’s a popular spot for both locals and tourists looking for a variety of items at competitive prices.

  2. Airport Terminal 2: While primarily a transport hub, it provides access to the airport’s various services and amenities.

  3. Shabab Al Ahli Club: A sports club that often hosts local sporting events and activities.

  4. NMC Hospital: One of Dubai’s prominent healthcare facilities.

5.

  1. Dubai Birds and Pets Market: A unique market specializing in birds and other pets, providing an interesting visit for pet enthusiasts.

  2. Emirates Engineering: While not a typical tourist attraction, it’s an important facility related to the Emirates airline.

These locations offer a mix of shopping, cultural experiences, and essential services, making the Bus 20A route a valuable option for various travel needs.

Traveling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can reach Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation, 2, the furthest point on the Bus 20A route starting from Al Nahda 1, Terminus, with a fare range of AED 68-83. Note that this journey will be facilitated through Hala Taxi services rather than the usual Careem ride option, as Careem rides are not available for this route.

At a fare of AED 5, it offers a cost-effective travel option. For convenience, the Careem app can provide fare estimates and travel details, making it a practical choice for navigating Dubai. Additionally, its extensive coverage ensures accessibility to essential services and attractions across the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 12, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
